title: Agent first onboarding is the future. The team cooked on this one 🧑‍🍳

content.summary: Agent first onboarding is the future. The team cooked on this one 🧑‍🍳 Firecrawl (@firecrawl) AI agents can now self-onboard to Firecrawl. They pick the path that fits your use case: - Replace native fetch and search with our scrape, search, and interact - Integrate our API into the app they're building for real-time web data Then you authorize and they're off 🔥 Video — https://nitter.net/firecrawl/status/2036472169409159414#m
